arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Chelsea – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host Enzo Maresca’s Chelsea this evening in a game that could prove pivotal in the race for Champions League football. City will be looking to bounce back after they squandered a two goal advantage away to PSG in the Champions League to eventually lose 4-2 in the French capital. Pep Guardiola has confirmed […] The post Manchester City vs Chelsea – Match Preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea offer Premier League rival choice of two midfielders as transfer plan emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea duo Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall and Carney Chukwuemeka have been offered to Everton if Armando Broja is going to be sent back. Dewsbury-Hall, who made his first Premier League start of the season during Chelsea's 3-1 win over Wolves on Monday, and former Aston Villa midfielder Chukwuemeka have been proposed.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer ranks three of the most skillful players he's faced... with a former teammate earning his number one spot
arts.sum: Chelsea 's rising star Cole Palmer has revealed his picks for the most skillful players in the Premier League during a recent interview with Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea or Man Utd? Benjamin Sesko has already picked his next club
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko is one of the most eligible players on the transfer market, but the Slovenia international already knows what club he wants to play for when he leaves the Bundesliga side. “Last summer when the project was pitched from Arsenal, Chelsea and Man United, Sesko picked Arsenal and then made a secondary choice of whether it was now or to stay at Leipzig,” football transfer news expert Ben Jacobs told Inside Gooners.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca gives telling Cole Palmer verdict as he makes Mo Salah comparison
